title: crotalaria huillensis subsp. zambesiaca
intro: Crotalaria huillensis subsp. zambesiaca, a subspecies of the Crotalaria huillensis plant, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). The medicinal properties of Crotalaria huillensis subsp. zambesiaca are attributed to its leaves and seeds, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate joint pain. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of Crotalaria huillensis subsp. zambesiaca are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
